THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARCH CAPITAL ADVISORS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VASKA, INC. $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $260.00 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,610.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR.
